section.title: es.tierno.daw.trasnferdaw.model.bbdd.TransferDAWDBFactory Class Reference

listitem.para: static TransferDAWDAO obtener (Database tipo) throws Exception

section.section:
Detailed Description
La clase TransferDAWDBFactory crea las posibles BD disponibles. Author
Iván Rafael Redondo.
The documentation for this class was generated from the following file: /home/usuario/Desktop/TransferDAW/trasnferdaw/src/main/java/es/tierno/daw/trasnferdaw/model/bbdd/TransferDAWDBFactory.java
